meta_title: Inflatable Tent N | Humanitarian and Event Tent
meta_desc: Multi-purpose inflatable N tent. Used by the Red Cross and for events. Large covered area, quick to set up, durable.
intro_desc: Discover the Hallucine N inflatable tent, a unique model that combines original design, maximum resistance and complete customisation. Ideal for all types of outdoor events, this tent lets you stand out from the crowd while offering a practical and reliable solution.
intro_quality_title: Reliability, Expertise, Quality: The Foundations of Our Inflatable Structures
intro_quality_desc: At Hallucine, we are committed to providing inflatables that embody the values of reliability, expertise and quality. Designed to meet the highest expectations, our products give you peace of mind every time you use them.
resistant_desc: The N inflatable tent is designed to withstand the most extreme conditions. Made from high-quality materials, it is perfectly airtight and will last an exceptionally long time, even at your outdoor events.
resistant_tpu_desc: The tent's internal structure is made from polyurethane (TPU), ensuring a 60-day autonomy once inflated. This chamber guarantees stable performance over an extended period, ideal for long-term events.
resistant_zip_desc: Allows the tent walls or canopy to be installed quickly and securely, making them easy to erect.
resistant_roof_desc: The roof is made from a high-quality water-repellent fabric, offering excellent weather resistance while maintaining a perfect seal.
resistant_para_desc: The parachute fabric used for the roof provides extra resistance to water and tearing.
resistant_skin_desc: This fire-retardant material not only ensures safety in the event of fire, but also provides additional protection against damp and harsh weather conditions.
quality_desc: Quality is non-negotiable for us. Our products undergo rigorous checks to ensure they meet the highest standards. From heavy-duty awning fabric to integrated LED lights for enhanced visibility, every detail is designed to provide the best possible user experience. Our customisable accessories, such as curved sidewalls and door or window walls, allow you to tailor your structure to your specific needs while maintaining a professional aesthetic.
custom_desc: The Hallucine N inflatable tent is 100% customisable to perfectly reflect your brand image or the atmosphere of your event.
custom_walls_desc: Choose the colours and design you want for each part of the tent.
custom_color_desc: You can also customise the colour of the inflatable to match your theme.
custom_print_desc: You can print logos, visuals or advertising messages on all surfaces of the tent, maximising its visibility during your event.
transport_desc: The Hallucine N inflatable tent is not only robust, but also very practical to transport and set up. Its light weight and included accessories make it an ideal solution for your outdoor events.
transport_light_desc: Despite its large size, the tent remains relatively light and folds easily for simplified transport. It comes in a specially designed carry bag.
transport_sand_desc: To ensure the tent's stability, a sand ballast system is included. It is placed under the tent and secured with straps.
transport_pump_desc: For quick inflation, the tent is fitted with a manual or electric pump, making set-up much easier.
specs_desc: Reliability is at the heart of our approach. Our structures are made from high-quality materials, such as Dacron 420 for the frames and weather-resistant Dacron 220 fabric for the awnings, guaranteeing prolonged use in a variety of weather conditions. Every component, from the inflation system to the sandbags ensuring stability, is designed to offer maximum safety for every installation.
conclusion_p1: The Hallucine N inflatable tent is the perfect option for your outdoor events. Its innovative design, exceptional strength and multiple customisation options make it an essential choice for companies and event organisers. Easy to install and transport, it provides optimum protection from the elements while offering maximum visibility for your messages and logos.
conclusion_p2: With many years' experience, our team has recognised expertise in the field of inflatables. We understand the challenges our customers can face, which is why we offer tailored, innovative solutions. From design to installation and delivery, we're here to ensure that you get a product that perfectly meets your needs.
